review_title: So much better than the Salesforce native app it's not even funny
description: We have been using Veloxy for nearly 3 years starting with the team that I lead as a pilot, and then eventually rolling it out to the entire sales organization at our company. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] has been excellent to work with throughout the entire process, and we would like to think that some of the enhancements of the product have come from the feedback from our field sales team. ;-) The field sales team is able to spend less time recording their sales activities in Salesforce, and more time actually selling.
author: Chris S.
pros: There are a couple of key things that I love about Veloxy: 1) Push notifications. This has been a HUGE missing thing for the Salesforce app. Veloxy will send you a notification to call a prospect at the time that you've designated. 2) Autologging of sales activities. I don't understand why anyone would ever make a phone call to a lead/opportunity that you know is in Salesforce without using Veloxy. If you call through the app, it will time stamp the conversation and you can immediately put in any notes. Talk-to-text is supported so it's very quick and easy to get your sales activities recorded for reference. 3) "Businesses Around Me" feature is great for our field sales reps. When they come out of an appointment, they're able to check to see if there are any likely prospects to visit while in the area. It's a great way to supplement other prospecting methods.
cons: I can't really think of any cons about using this app. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] has been great about working with us to address any customizations that we may need in order to have the smoothest experience possible.

description: Email templates to reminders its a great tool to optimize your sales.
author: Dane H.
pros: I love the GEO tracker for my leads. It helps me as a field sales guy to see the opportunities around me.
cons: Not much to dislike about this product. Its very easy to use and it saves you time. It also logs all your interaction and calls for easy record keeping.

review_title: Veloxy has great potential, but lacks the technical support needed for customers
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ability to create mass email campaigns for customers.
cons: Veloxy stopped sending my emails. Then when I contacted “Veloxy Support” he just sent several emails back and forth but never fixed anything. Veloxy has great potential, but they NEED a REAL Support Team that actually helps their customers.

review_title: Veloxy gives me more selling time and helps me focus on selling.
description: I can focus better on communicating with propsects and there for make more sales.
author: Steve F.
pros: Veloxy saves me 45 or more minutes every day, as I don't have to manually log each activity. For example, logging emails sent. Also, with email tracking, I see in real-time when a prospect opens my email, so I can prioritize with whom I need to follow up. The templates I create for email are helpful because I don’t need to craft new language for common engagement emails - big time saver. Color-coded reminders pop up on my phone and keep me informed of what I should be doing, like focusing on specific tasks leading to sales. When I am out in the field, Veloxy maps out where other accounts and prospects are so I can take advantage of selling more.
cons: I needed to refresh the install of Veloxy when we upgraded to Office 365. No downsides. There were a few missing features several months ago, but were added so I don't have any substanative "cons."

author: Dawn D.
pros: Veloxy opens up the entire business for each rep for people leaders. With out pulling multiple reports with 1 click in veloxy engage, you can see everything you need to see. In addition, I love the notifications of activities as well as the ability to track and measure emails and contacts with a simple click.
cons: Nothing, the designers have really listened and updated the software as needed int he time I have used the software.

description: Advantage over other sales who are not able to get the information and numbers Veloxy provides.
author: Elizabeth I.
pros: I like that the software takes the unknowns out of the equation. I track my emails and can tell whether the emails are being read and if not, I know to change my approach.
cons: I did not understand that when I opened the email on a different device then the one I composed and sent it from, the software would count that as a view. I was thinking the customer was opening the email more than they were. I figured it out though.

description: The ability to update and track interactions with customers is a great tool
author: Harry B.
pros: I appreciate that businesses are pre-loaded it makes entering new accounts a much quicker and efficient process. Tracking and updating interactions are a breeze
cons: There is a bit of learning curve between the mobile/app version and the desktop

description: My overall experience has been extremely positive. With the exception of some small tweets this is a very easy and comprehensive application to use while on the fly.
author: Cristian R.
pros: I love how it would track information just by chatting into your phone. Allowing for quick and easy upload of information and sales.
cons: I would like an easier view of when I'm searching an existing client. At times it could be very confusing.

description: Overall, I love it. I like that it organizes who I've called and when, and it's no surprise who is calling me when they call me back. I can quickly log my call and take notes without carrying around a notebook.
author: Bobbi Jo D.
pros: What I like the most is that Veloxy tracks my emails and phone calls to show my activity - but it also tracks my email and shows me when my email has been opened.
cons: The only thing that I find to be a little mundane is that I have to upload prospects using another tool using what that particular tool has in mind - if you want to create your own prospect list you have to use a formatted excel spreadsheet to upload. Once you get the hang of it, it's just a matter of copying and pasting, but it can be time consuming for a newbie.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: This is a great app and plugin to Outlook. It helps track things that I would otherwise have trouble tracking. It helps keeps me organized with follow ups. I love that I can see when a customer opens my email so I can better time my follow up phone calls.
author: Maria M.
pros: It is easy to use and keeps me organized
cons: I like everything about Veloxy. It is great!

review_title: Best Mobile App on the market if you use Salesforce and Gmail!
author: Jose R.
pros: The Veloxy Gmail/Plugin helps sync emails to Salesforce more efficiently, reducing time manually copying and pasting email information into Salesforce. All of my outbound emails are currently getting logged automatically, and any responses to my emails from the prospect are also getting logged automatically. This is truly a game changer in automation and efficiency. For those still using the email functions in Salesforce, this gives you another option to add email templates in Gmail and send an email directly from Gmail. The Difference is how the customer receives the email. The email in Salesforce comes from “Salesforce, on behalf of Jose Rivera”. The email sent in Gmail from Veloxy, shows as coming from your normal Gmail Email. The Email analytics help provide a couple of pieces of information. One; it allows you to see if the prospect has opened the email, and how many times. Two; it helps gauge the interest, based on how many times they’ve opened the email. Three; automatic notification on your phone when they open the email, allowing you to schedule a future task in Salesforce to call the prospect. The email templates allow you to add in and save favorite templates. Tracking can be turned off or on at any time, or for specific emails. Overall, it is an awesome product for anyone in sales! Working with the Veloxy team for any questions has been great as well, they provide A+ customer service and are quick to respond.
cons: Everything about this software is great.

author: Brian G.
pros: How many times have you been in a meeting and hand writing notes? Then you go to another meeting and hand write notes? Then after the 12hr day you say I'll type those into SFDC tomorrow, and tomorrow never happens? Me, too! Not anymore, with this app I take my notes right in the app on my iPhone or iPad and schedule the action items in the same screen. Then they are in SFDC before I leave the account. Then when I call to follow up on the visit, Veloxy logs my call in SFDC and prompts me to make a note of the calls content and a follow up action. If Veloxy could just drive me to the appointment, maybe in the next update? What if I'm in a target rich environment and want explore the surrounding businesses to see which are potential customers, it does that very effectively. If your a professional salesperson who want to get an extra 10hrs a week to build your empire and not juggle the administrative side of your business, invest in this app and it's done.
cons: Just is customer support is a litte slow service but over all I am totally satisfied wtih them.

description: This has boosted my sales by making my funnel easier to manage. I have used it ever since starting my job and don’t know how I would go without it at this point. I like that they add new features frequently also.
author: Brent J.
pros: I like that I have all my Salesforce leads right at my finger tips on an app. It is a pain to login to SF every time I need to update an opportunity and with Veloxy I can update right from the app for most things. The most valuable part is that I can pull up an Opportunity, click a button to dial the contacts phone number, and it automatically logs the call as an activity when the call is over, which saves me a TON of time! You can also send emails that will track if the prospect has opened it and that is hugely helpful as well.
cons: There are some glitches from time to time, where the app will shutdown or an error will prevent me from making changes to an opp, but I just reopen the app when that happens and everything is fine. If they could work out a few of the bugs it would be perfect.

review_title: Fantastic sales tool and effective time-saver
description: Veloxy has helped me save time, become more efficient, and streamline my day-to-day sales responsibilities.
author: Erika S.
pros: The Veloxy for Outlook add-on allows you to send individual, customized emails to a list of recipients, making it quick and easy to communicate to a large audience. The Veloxy smart phone app make it easy to log phone calls, look up prospect/customer information, and log emails while out in the field or away from your desk. With the app, you can also pull a map that shows all of the qualified leads and opportunities in your area, making it quick and easy to schedule drop-ins.
cons: If you do not want updates or alerts, make sure to turn off this feature in the mobile app.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Veloxy is real so it's better than magic. When we asked for a functionality that was missing, they built it. No trick of the hands - this is real. Thank you Veloxy.
cons: Training was short. I will need several touches to understand how to use all its functionality

review_title: Best tool for my sales position
author: Nick B.
pros: This is the most useful tool we have available for my position and job. It gives me reminders on locations I have saved for prospecting as well as alerts that let me know my customers have read my emails. This software and app keeps me up to date on locations I may have missed when it comes to my business so that I don't forget to follow up with clients. I highly recommend this for anyone in a sales position similar to mine that likes a app that reminds you of your calendar as well as small things that you forget to do. Thank you
cons: There was nothing I would change. Software is kept up to date.

review_title: Must have tool for outside sales using SalesForce
author: David I.
pros: Easy logging of activities to my SalesForce opportunities. At Comcast, we live in SalesForce and all customer interactions need to be logged to keep our opportunities active. Veloxy saves us so much time by automatically logging emails to opps, phone call logging, as well as the geolocation feature making our sales routes more efficient.
cons: There is a lag on the screen that shows how many days since the last activity happened. Would be nice to have it show blank, and then populate with the correct number of days elapsed.

description: Veloxy helps me manage my funnel efficiently from anywhere and it helps me identify opportunities while I am working in the field.
author: Michael N.
pros: Veloxy enables me to easily track communication with prospects which helps me verify the accounts I am working and to assure my prospects are protected from other sales reps. I really like the tracking feature that allows me to see when my prospects are reading my emails. Shortly after I know my email has been viewed, I like to call the prospect since I am fresh on their mind and push to move the sales process at least one step further.
cons: Honestly, I haven't found anything that has been disappointing. With how I use the software, it is perfect for me.

author: Matthew L.
pros: I used this an my daily cadence when prospecting. I love how clean the dashboards are, and the granular detail is great. I can easily track when and where my prospecting emails are opened. This is a tool for any sales professional.
cons: None that I have experienced yet

description: This app has allowed my team to keep their opportunities updated while they are in the field working. Prior to Veloxy, reps would have to go back to the office or to a wi-fi hotspot and get out their laptop. This has freed up a lot of time to prospect more.
author: Daniel G.
pros: Versatility, ease of use and lots of functionality. Helps the team keep their work updated while out in the field.
cons: Not the easiest process to convert opportunities, but all of the other features out weigh that.

author: David C.
pros: I have been using Veloxy for almost two years. It really helps with Data entry out in the field as I can "Log-on-the-fly" for meetings, calls, add new prospects and much more. Veloxy also help me keep up to date with scheduled calls needed for that day while I'm on the go.
cons: It would be nice to have Veloxy auto log incoming calls from clients listed as contact in the Salesforce opportunity

author: Joseph S.
pros: Fast Salesforce opportunitymanagement. Fast - easy to use - and all in One App. Mails and calendars and salesforce records .
cons: It is useful to have a period or advancement following component. really love this software for its using.

author: Amanda V.
pros: This application has made my life so much easier. It allows me to never forget about a client. It notifies you about when you need to reach out. In sales this is a MUST have. Also the founder is very responsive and helpful when ever myself or peers have questions.
cons: often it logs me off of sales force. However this could also be a security measure with my company

description: Love it and use it daily
author: Fred Michael P.
pros: I love that it integrates with salesforce. Its easy to stay updated with my CRM with veloxy
cons: wish I had it sooner. We had a competitor prior and Veloxy is the best

description: Veloxy takes the guesswork out of managing your accounts. It organizes your day with relevant info and action to take at the right time. In the business I’m time is money and I’m closing more sales because Veloxy manages my time.
author: Corey W.
pros: What I like most is that Veloxy keeps me ahead of the curve. All of my information is from appointments, follow up, and GPS locations are at your fingertips. If you are not using this app you are behind the eight ball.
cons: What I like least about Veloxy is that I didn’t start using it sooner.
